---
title: "Hépatologie"
---

## SNFGE — Recommandations {#SNFGE .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="SNFGE">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.snfge.org/recommandations-medicales" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/snfge.png" alt="SNFGE — Recommandations">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.snfge.org/recommandations-medicales" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">SNFGE — Recommandations</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Société Nationale Française de Gastro-Entérologie
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
